name: check-improve-loop
default_program:
[stages: preflight>detect>analyze>review>reflect>plan>handoff>audit |
 scope: diff|repo|paths(glob,...) |
 policy: evidence,deterministic-output |
 lens: hickey-carmack |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: MISSION_GOAL
required_inputs.description: One bounded mission that should improve through self-critique until done or blocked.

required_inputs.name: TARGET_SCOPE
required_inputs.description: Exact scope the self-verify loop is allowed to inspect or improve.

required_inputs.name: DONE_CONDITION
required_inputs.description: Explicit quality bar and the proof required for each condition.

required_inputs.name: CURRENT_EVIDENCE
required_inputs.description: Current implementation evidence, review notes, tests, or docs from prior passes.

required_inputs.name: COMPANION_SKILLS
required_inputs.description: Narrow companion skills allowed for the next improvement pass.

required_inputs.name: MAX_PASSES
required_inputs.description: Safety ceiling for same-turn refinement passes. Default to 3 when omitted.

required_inputs.name: CONSTRAINTS
required_inputs.description: Non-goals, simplicity limits, approval gates, or quality boundaries.
